# AudioVisual Nepal — https://www.audiovisualnepal.com

Nepal's professional audio-visual solutions provider: design, supply and installation
of PA systems, voice evacuation (EN54), IP network audio, video conferencing,
smart podiums and LED displays across Nepal. Authorised distributor for DSPPA,
InfoBit, Tenveo and Focus; authorised Lampro partner.

## Key pages
- Solutions by industry: https://www.audiovisualnepal.com/solutions
- Solution finder (guided recommendation): https://www.audiovisualnepal.com/solution-finder
- BOQ lookup (check tender model lists): https://www.audiovisualnepal.com/boq-lookup
- Product catalog: https://www.audiovisualnepal.com/products
- Brand catalogs (860+ models): /brands/dsppa/catalog, /brands/infobit/catalog, /brands/tenveo/catalog, /brands/lampro/catalog
- Verified projects: https://www.audiovisualnepal.com/projects
- Knowledge center: https://www.audiovisualnepal.com/blog

## Facts
- 100+ verified installations across Nepal; references on request.
- Quotations within 24 hours on working days.
- Contact: info@audiovisualnepal.com · +977 9762109538 (phone/WhatsApp) · Kathmandu, Nepal.
